## Summary

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor

## Validation
- [ ] `npm run setup`
- [ ] `npm run doctor`
- [ ] `npm run test:smoke`

## Checklist
- [ ] Scoped change (no unrelated edits)
- [ ] Docs updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Keeps C + SQLite core lightweight
